final:
module top_module(
  input rst,
  input reset,
  input direction,
  output reg [3:0] count
);always @(posedge rst) begin
  if (reset) begin
    count <= 4'b0000;
  end else if (direction) begin
    if (count == 4'b1111) begin
      count <= 4'b0000;
    end else begin
      count <= count + 1;
    end
  end else begin
    if (count == 4'b0000) begin
      count <= 4'b1111;
    end else begin
      count <= count - 1;
    end
  end
end

endmodule
